calendar.matters:
Progress Report On The Establishment And Funding The Coogan Trust Accounts And The Deposit Of Money Into The Blocked Accounts.
Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Off Calendar

Progress Report On The Establishment And Funding The Coogan Trust Accounts And The Deposit Of Money Into The Blocked Accounts.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Continued To Aug-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Minor'S Employment Contract
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition for Approval of the Employment Contract for the Minor, Julius Ceazar Herrera.
Dept. 514. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Elliot P. Cahn, Esq. and David M. Given, Esq. appeared for petitioner Empire Distribution, Inc.
Joseph Seiler, Director of Business Affairs for petitioner Empire Distribution, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Tucker Page, Esq. appeared with Eduardo Herrera, who appeared via CourtCall as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Julius Ceazar Herrera, who also appeared via CourtCall.
Mr. Herrera and the minor were placed under oath and testified.
Mark Schottinger, Esq., counsel for the minor, Julius Ceazar Herrera, also appeared via CourtCall.
Order appointing Eduardo Herrera Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on May 17, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

(1) The Contract is approved as to all of the terms and conditions set forth therein;

(2) Petitioner Eduardo Herrera is ORDERED to deduct, until the minor attains the age of eighteen years, fifteen percent (15%) of the gross earnings payable by petitioner to and/or for the services of the minor pursuant to the Contract, and to deposit said fifteen percent (15%) into one or more Coogan Trust Accounts (Blocked Accounts) establised and maintained for the benefit of the minor at one or more financial institutions in the State of California in accordance with California Family Code Section 6753; and

(3) Except as provided in California Family Code Section 6753 (as amended effective January 1, 2004), there shall be no withdrawals of funds on deposit in said Coogan Trust Accounts to minor Julius Ceazar Herrera until he (Julius Ceazar Herrera) attains the age of eighteen (18) years on July 23, 2021, or until further ORDER of this Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to July 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the establishment and funding the Coogan Trust Accounts and Deposit of Money into the Blocked Accounts.

Proposed Orders Approving the Contract of the Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Minor'S Employment Contract
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To May-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
